OPENCTI_URL.description: The URL of the OpenCTI platform.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope or type of data the connector is importing, either a MIME type or Stix Object.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

RST_REPORT_HUB_BASE_URL.description: The base URL of the RST Cloud API. In some cases, you may want to use a local API endpoint.

RST_REPORT_HUB_API_KEY.description: Your API Key for accessing RST Cloud.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT.description: Connection timeout to the API in seconds.

RST_REPORT_HUB_READ_TIMEOUT.description: Read timeout for each feed in seconds. If the connector is unable to fetch a report in time, increase the read timeout.

RST_REPORT_HUB_RETRY_DELAY.description: Specifies how long to wait in seconds before next attempt to connect to the API.

RST_REPORT_HUB_RETRY_ATTEMPTS.description: Number of retry attempts when failing to connect to the API.

RST_REPORT_HUB_IMPORT_START_DATE.description: The date from which to retrieve reports in the format YYYYMMDD (e.g. 20240527). By default, calculated as 7 days ago.

RST_REPORT_HUB_FETCH_INTERVAL.description: The interval in seconds between data fetch operations.

RST_REPORT_HUB_LANGUAGE.description: The language for reports. Reach out to support@rstcloud.net to update this parameter.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_OBSERVABLES.description: Whether to create observables in addition to indicators.

RST_REPORT_HUB_CREATE_CUSTOM_TTPS.description: Whether to create attack-pattern objects with custom names not yet present in the MITRE ATT&CK framework.

RST_REPORT_HUB_SET_DETECTION_FLAG.description: Whether to set the detection flag on indicators from reports.

RST_REPORT_HUB_REPORT_LABELS_DISABLED.description: A comma-separated list of labels to ignore when creating Report objects.
